Top 5 GLP-1 Doctors in Florida (2026)

GLP-1 therapy · FL · Published 2026-07-07

How this list was compiled

Compiled from public physician directories, the NPI registry, state licensing records, and published patient ratings on Google and Healthgrades. Ranked by verified GLP-1 service offering, years in practice, and volume of public patient ratings. No physician paid for inclusion.

SAMPLE POST. Fictional data; format reference only. Delete before first deploy.

One-paragraph intro: what GLP-1 therapy is (neutral, no claims), why finding a supervising physician matters, what this list covers.

1. Dr. Jane Example, MD, Miami

Two or three sentences per doctor: verified specialty, clinic affiliation, city, and platform-attributed rating if available (“4.9★ across 210 Google reviews”). Nothing unverified.

2. Dr. John Sample, DO, Tampa

Same pattern.

How to choose

Neutral guidance: licensure checks, telehealth availability, insurance questions. No doctor recommendations beyond the sourced list.

Sources 12

Medical disclaimerThis content is for informational purposes only and is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a licensed physician before starting any therapy.
CorrectionsInformation on this page was compiled from public sources and verified against the NPI registry at the time of publication. If you represent this practitioner and something is inaccurate or you'd like the listing updated or removed, email corrections@example.com. We act on requests within 5 business days.
